introSection: Wild Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Kariya-shi Kotsu Jido Yuen in Kariya, Aichi, Japan. It was replaced by the Kids Coaster.
fullText:
Wild Mouse was a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Kariya-shi Kotsu Jido Yuen in Kariya, Aichi, Japan. It was replaced by the Kids Coaster.

White track and supports.
